docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCGLADE, LOREN D.  TRUSTEE, RADO REV. I.V. TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT SQUIRREL COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,308.29 AS TO DEFENDANT SQUIRREL COMPANY, INC.
